scope: P0-4 NLRP3 mushroom immunomodulation: Lingzhi spore powder, Yun Zhi PSP/PSK, Maitake/Grifola, fungal polysaccharide NLRP3/IL-1 beta/gout frames
method: Browser-captured CNKI Overseas /kns8s/brief/grid POST shape replayed with local curl; parse first page result table. Discovery only, not evidence-tier promotion. A focused correction pass added fraction/common-name terms after exact species/product+mechanism queries returned mostly zero or noisy results.
query_plan_correction: Added 灰树花 as the Chinese common-name frame for maitake/Grifola frondosa; 舞茸/マイタケ are Japanese framings and under-fit CNKI Chinese subject search.
